name: Chain of custody
description: Controls ensuring that regulated materials (e.g., human tissue, cells, clinical samples, drug product) are accessed, handled, transferred, and stored only by authorized personnel with full traceability.
scaling_rules: high_risk -> increased_review_frequency; high_transfer_frequency -> expanded_logging; weak_access_control -> mandatory_dual_verification
internal_notes: Domain applies to any equipment storing or handling regulated biological materials.
